ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0 = female; 1 = male) */,
  "cholesterol_level" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar (1 = true; 0 = false) */,
  "resting_ecg" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiographic results */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exercise_angina" INTEGER /* Exercise induced angina (1 = yes; 0 = no) */,
  "old_peak" REAL /* Oldpeak = ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "slope" INTEGER /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thal" INTEGER /* Thalassemia (1 = normal; 2 = fixed defect; 3 = reversable defect) */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable (1 = presence of disease; 0 = absence) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is a smoker */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Average alcohol consumption in standard drinks per week */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Description of the patient's physical activity level */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of cardiovascular diseases */,
  "previous_conditions" TEXT /* List of previous medical conditions */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination history and status */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the doctor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the doctor's practice */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of professional experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of professional certifications */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient attending the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor for the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., follow-up, initial consultation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment (e.g., clinic, hospital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient related to the record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical record entry */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided for the condition */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the entry */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up appointment */,
  "medication" TEXT /* List of prescribed medications */,
  "lab_results" TEXT /* Summary of relevant lab results */,
  "vital_signs" TEXT /* Summary of vital signs (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk score entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the score is calculated */,
  "score" REAL /* Calculated risk score value */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for the risk assessment */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Categorized risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommended actions or interventions */,
  "probability_of_event" REAL /* Probability of a cardiovascular event occurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the access level (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
